/usr/bin/ar qc libCMMath.a CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Math/LAtan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Math/LSinCos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Math/Matrix4f.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Math/HalfFloat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Math/Random.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Math/Color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Geometry/Plane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Geometry/AABB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Geometry/OBB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Geometry/OBB_SetFromPoints_AVX2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Geometry/BoundingSphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Geometry/BoundingVolumes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Geometry/Cylinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Geometry/Cone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Geometry/Ray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CMMath.dir/Geometry/Frustum.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libCMMath.a
